# Docker build defaults
IMAGE_NAME ?= tap-edu-backend
REGISTRY ?= gz01-srdart.srdcloud.cn/tdp-paas/tdp_paas-tap-snapshot-docker-local
TAG ?= $(shell git describe --tags --always --dirty)
PLATFORMS ?= linux/amd64,linux/arm64

# Bin directory
BIN_DIR := $(shell pwd)/bin
SWAG_BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/swag
MOCKGEN_BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/mockgen
GOLANGCI_LINT_BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/golangci-lint

# init container image
INIT_CONTAINER_IMAGE_NAME ?= dev-bootstrap
INIT_CONTAINER_IMAGE_TAG ?= v1.0.1-rc3

# 实验课程镜像名称
# miniconda3 container image name
MINICONDA_IMAGE_NAME ?= miniconda3
MINICONDA_IMAGE_TAG ?= v1

# tf-cu121 container image name
TF_CU121_IMAGE_NAME ?= tf-cu121
TF_CU121_IMAGE_TAG ?= v1

# torch-cu121 container image name
TORCH_CU121_IMAGE_NAME ?= torch-cu121
TORCH_CU121_IMAGE_TAG ?= v1

.PHONY: check-swag
check-swag:
	which $(SWAG_BIN) || GOBIN=$(BIN_DIR) go install github.com/swaggo/swag/cmd/swag@latest
	
.PHONY: swag
swag: check-swag
	$(SWAG_BIN) init -g cmd/server/main.go -d . -o docs/swagger --parseDependency --parseInternal

.PHONY: check-mockgen
check-mockgen:
	which $(MOCKGEN_BIN) || GOBIN=$(BIN_DIR) go install go.uber.org/mock/mockgen@latest

.PHONY: generate
generate: check-mockgen
	PATH=$(BIN_DIR):$$PATH go generate ./...

.PHONY: build-image
build-image:
	@echo "Building image $(REGISTRY)/$(IMAGE_NAME):$(TAG)..."
	@IMAGE_NAME=$(IMAGE_NAME) REGISTRY=$(REGISTRY) TAG=$(TAG) PLATFORMS=$(PLATFORMS) ./deploy/build.sh

```
Post "http://localhost:4566/test-bucket/test/1774852874461175000/no-parts.zip?uploads=": dial tcp [::1]:4566: connect: connection refused
```

This is an E2E test that requires LocalStack to be running. Let me look at the test file to understand the setup.

1	package storage

3	import (
4		"bytes"

17	)

19	func TestStorageMultipartE2E(t *testing.T) {
20		RegisterFailHandler(Fail)
21		RunSpecs(t, "Storage Multipart Upload E2E Tests")
22	}
23	
24	var _ = Describe("Storage Multipart Upload E2E Tests", func() {
25		var (
26			testServer *setup.TestServer
27			httpHelper *helpers.HTTPTestHelper
28		)
29	
30		BeforeEach(func() {
31			var err error
32			ctx := context.Background()
33	
34			// 创建测试服务器（使用 LocalStack）
35			testServer, err = setup.NewTestServer(ctx, setup.WithLocalStack("test-bucket"))
36			Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
37			Expect(testServer).NotTo(BeNil())
38	
39			// 获取 HTTP 辅助工具
40			httpHelper = testServer.GetHTTPHelper()
41		})
42	
43		AfterEach(func() {
44			// 关闭测试服务器
45			if testServer != nil {
46				_ = testServer.Shutdown(context.Background())
47			}
48			// 注意：S3 数据清理可以通过脚本完成: ./scripts/localstack.sh cleanup
49		})
50	
51		Describe("分片上传完整流程", func() {
52			It("应该成功完成分片上传", func() {
53	
54				// 准备测试数据
55				// 注意：S3 要求除最后一个分片外，每个分片至少 5MB
56				testKey := helpers.GenerateTestKey("test", "large-file.zip")
57				testContentType := "application/zip"
58				testData := helpers.GenerateRandomBytes(12 * 1024 * 1024)       // 12MB 测试数据
59				testParts := helpers.SplitBytesIntoParts(testData, 5*1024*1024) // 分成 5MB 的分片（符合 S3 要求）
60	
61				// 1. 初始化分片上传
62				initReq := storage.InitMultipartUploadRequest{
63					Key:         testKey,
64					ContentType: testContentType,
65				}
66	
67				initResp, err := httpHelper.PostJSON("/api/v1/storage/multipart/init", initReq)
68				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
69				Expect(initResp.StatusCode).To(Equal(http.StatusOK))
70	
71				var initResult map[string]interface{}
72				err = httpHelper.ParseJSONResponse(initResp, &initResult)
73				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
74				Expect(initResult["code"]).To(Equal(common.CodeSuccess), "API should return success, got: %v", initResult)
75	
76				// 安全地获取 uploadID
77				data, ok := initResult["respBody"].(map[string]interface{})
78				Expect(ok).To(BeTrue(), "data field should be a map, got: %v", initResult["respBody"])
79				uploadID, ok := data["uploadId"].(string)
80				Expect(ok).To(BeTrue(), "uploadId should be a string")
81				Expect(uploadID).NotTo(BeEmpty())
82	
83				// 2. 上传多个分片
84				for i, partData := range testParts {
85					partNumber := i + 1
86	
87					// 上传分片（使用 FormData）
88					uploadResp, err := httpHelper.PostMultipart(
89						"/api/v1/storage/multipart/upload",
90						map[string]string{
91							"key":        testKey,
92							"uploadId":   uploadID,
93							"partNumber": fmt.Sprintf("%d", partNumber),
94						},
95						"file",
96						bytes.NewReader(partData),
97					)
98					Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
99					Expect(uploadResp.StatusCode).To(Equal(http.StatusOK))
100	
101					var uploadResult map[string]interface{}
102					err = httpHelper.ParseJSONResponse(uploadResp, &uploadResult)
103					Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
104					Expect(uploadResult["code"]).To(Equal(common.CodeSuccess), "Upload part should succeed, got: %v", uploadResult)
105	
106					// 安全地获取 etag
107					uploadData, ok := uploadResult["respBody"].(map[string]interface{})
108					Expect(ok).To(BeTrue(), "data field should be a map, got: %v", uploadResult["respBody"])
109					etag, ok := uploadData["etag"].(string)
110					Expect(ok).To(BeTrue(), "etag should be a string")
111					Expect(etag).NotTo(BeEmpty())
112				}
113	
114				// 3. 完成分片上传
115				completeReq := storage.CompleteMultipartUploadRequest{
116					Key:      testKey,
117					UploadID: uploadID,
118				}
119	
120				completeResp, err := httpHelper.PostJSON("/api/v1/storage/multipart/complete", completeReq)
121				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
122				Expect(completeResp.StatusCode).To(Equal(http.StatusOK))
123	
124				var completeResult map[string]interface{}
125				err = httpHelper.ParseJSONResponse(completeResp, &completeResult)
126				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
127				Expect(completeResult["code"]).To(Equal(common.CodeSuccess), "Complete upload should succeed, got: %v", completeResult)
128	
129				// 安全地获取 key
130				completeData, ok := completeResult["respBody"].(map[string]interface{})
131				Expect(ok).To(BeTrue(), "data field should be a map, got: %v", completeResult["respBody"])
132				key, ok := completeData["key"].(string)
133				Expect(ok).To(BeTrue(), "key should be a string")
134				Expect(key).To(Equal(testKey))
135	
136				// 4. 验证文件已上传到 S3（可以通过脚本验证: ./scripts/localstack.sh verify <bucket> <key>）
137				// 这里简化处理，只验证 API 返回成功
138			})
139	
140			It("应该支持大文件分片上传", func() {
141				// 准备更大的测试数据（10MB）
142				testKey := helpers.GenerateTestKey("test", "very-large-file.bin")
143				testContentType := "application/octet-stream"

192	
193				completeResp, err := httpHelper.PostJSON("/api/v1/storage/multipart/complete", completeReq)

195				Expect(completeResp.StatusCode).To(Equal(http.StatusOK))
196				completeResp.Body.Close()

28	// TestServerOption 测试服务器配置选项

30	
31	type TestServerConfig struct {

35		TDSCURL       string
36	}
37	
38	// WithLocalStack 启用 LocalStack（S3）
39	func WithLocalStack(bucket string) TestServerOption {
40		return func(cfg *TestServerConfig) {
41			cfg.UseLocalStack = true
42			cfg.Bucket = bucket
43		}
44	}
45	
46	// WithTDSC 启用 TDSC（可选）
47	func WithTDSC(url string) TestServerOption {
48		return func(cfg *TestServerConfig) {

50			cfg.TDSCURL = url
51		}
52	}
53	
54	// NewTestServer 创建测试服务器
55	func NewTestServer(ctx context.Context, opts ...TestServerOption) (*TestServer, error) {
56		cfg := &TestServerConfig{
57			Bucket: "test-bucket",
58		}
59		for _, opt := range opts {
60			opt(cfg)
61		}
62	
63		// 初始化日志
64		logger, err := zap.NewDevelopment()
65		if err != nil {
66			return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create logger: %w", err)
67		}
68	
69		// 创建测试配置
70		testConfig := &config.Config{
71			Server: config.ServerConfig{
72				Mode: "test",
73			},
74			Log: config.LogConfig{
75				Level:      "debug",
76				OutputPath: "stdout",
77			},
78			Auth: config.AuthConfig{
79				Enabled:   false, // 测试环境禁用认证
80				AuthType:  "jwt",
81				JWTSecret: "test-secret",
82				TokenTTL:  3600,
83			},
84			K8s: config.K8sConfig{
85				Namespace: "test",
86			},
87		}
88	
89		// 配置 LocalStack（LocalStack 应该已经通过脚本启动）
90		// 注意：运行测试前需要先执行: ./scripts/localstack.sh create
91		// bucket 会在脚本中自动创建
92		if cfg.UseLocalStack {
93			testConfig.S3 = config.S3Config{
94				Endpoint:  "http://localhost:4566", // LocalStack 默认地址
95				AccessKey: "test",

97				Bucket:    cfg.Bucket,
98				Region:    "us-east-1",
99			}
100		}
101	
102		// 配置 TDSC（如果需要）
103		var tdscClient tdsc.Client

108			}

110			// 如果需要，可以在这里初始化
111		}
112

118	
119		// 创建 Gin 引擎
120		gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)
121		router := gin.New()
122		router.Use(gin.Recovery())
123	
124		// 注册路由
125		handler.RegisterRoutes(router, authMiddleware, authService, logger, testConfig)
126	
127		// 创建测试服务器
128		server := httptest.NewServer(router)
129	
130		return &TestServer{
131			Server:     server,
132			Router:     router,
133			Config:     testConfig,
134			Logger:     logger,
135			TDSCClient: tdscClient,
136		}, nil
137	}
138

144	
145		// LocalStack 容器由脚本管理，这里不需要停止

148	}
